world.title: Trade in transition: financing, competitiveness and the future of SA agriculture

Writing for African Farming, Ovizikhungo Sicwetsha, Head of Transactional Banking for the mid-corporate segment at Nedbank, argues that the ability of financial institutions to structure, fund and de-risk growth in a fragmented world will be decisive – and that Africa’s expanding markets offer South Africa’s agricultural sector its greatest long-term opportunity.
